excluded.reason: LINK_ONLY: Source intent uncertain: The Decoder is a legitimate AI news source, but the product name 'GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra' with 'Sol' appears potentially humorous, and the claim of solving a 50-year conjecture in under an hour is extraordinarily ambitious. The measured tone and mention of mathematician criticism suggests genuine reporting, but the extraordinary nature of the claim warrants caution.
excluded.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra reportedly solves a 50-year-old math problem in under an hour
